resources.string: Relative hearing threshold chart. No relative level data available.
%1$s ear has no relative level data
%1$s section selected. Upgrade required for live values.
%1$s analytics range locked. Upgrade to Pro.
%1$s analytics range selected. Upgrade required for live values.
Camera overlay locked. Upgrade to Pro.
30-day weighted dB trend chart. No monthly exposure data.

plurals.name: a11y_monthly_trend_chart_with_data
plurals.item: 30-day weighted dB trend chart. %1$s. Rolling average %2$s dB. %3$d day with data, range %4$s to %5$s dB.
30-day weighted dB trend chart. %1$s. Rolling average %2$s dB. %3$d days with data, range %4$s to %5$s dB.

resources.string: Dosimeter mode locked. Upgrade to Pro.

plurals.name: a11y_meter_live_chart_active
plurals.item: Live 30-second sound chart. %1$d sample. Latest %2$d dB, maximum %3$d dB.
Live 30-second sound chart. %1$d samples. Latest %2$d dB, maximum %3$d dB.

resources.string: Live 30-second sound chart. No samples yet.

plurals.name: a11y_meter_live_chart_paused
plurals.item: Paused 30-second sound chart. %1$d sample. Latest %2$d dB, maximum %3$d dB.
Paused 30-second sound chart. %1$d samples. Latest %2$d dB, maximum %3$d dB.

resources.string: Recording session. Duration %1$s. Weighting %2$s. Response %3$s. Sample rate %4$s. Input %5$s.
Dosimeter. %1$s. Dose %2$s. TWA %3$s. LAeq %4$s. Projected dose %5$s. Remaining exposure %6$s.
Dosimeter preview. Upgrade required for live dose values.
Sound references. Nearest reference %1$s, %2$d dB. Current level %3$d dB. %4$s.
Spectral analysis bars. Waiting for live capture.
Spectral analysis preview bars. Upgrade required for live values.

plurals.name: a11y_spectral_analysis_bars_live
plurals.item: Spectral analysis bars. Dominant frequency %1$s, bandwidth %2$s, %3$d frequency band.
Spectral analysis bars. Dominant frequency %1$s, bandwidth %2$s, %3$d frequency bands.

resources.string: Spectrogram preview. Upgrade required for live values.

plurals.name: a11y_spectrogram_live
plurals.item: Live spectrogram. %1$d time row, %2$d frequency bands.
Live spectrogram. %1$d time rows, %2$d frequency bands.

resources.string: RTA octave bars. Waiting for live capture.
RTA octave preview bars. Upgrade required for live values.

plurals.name: a11y_rta_bars_live
plurals.item: Live RTA octave bars. %1$d band, peak %2$s.
Live RTA octave bars. %1$d bands, peak %2$s.

resources.string: Sound type detection. Waiting for live detection.

plurals.name: a11y_sound_detection_live
plurals.item: Sound type detection. Current type %1$s, confidence %2$d percent.
Sound type detection. Current type %1$s, confidence %2$d percent.

resources.string: Sound type detection preview. Upgrade required for live values.
Last 24 hours chart. No chart samples available.
Weekly exposure chart. No daily samples available.
Allow camera access to show the live preview.
Camera access is blocked. Open Settings to enable it.
Video records camera only. Microphone audio is not saved.
Camera preview cannot start on this device right now.
Start your first measurement to unlock insights.
Keep measuring to build a 7-day baseline.
Weekly noise exposure is in the lower range.
Exposure today is %1$d%% above your weekly average.
Exposure today is %1$d%% below your weekly average.
Exposure today matches your weekly average.

plurals.name: heart_rate_chart_description
plurals.item: Heart rate chart. %1$d sample. Latest %2$s BPM, range %3$s to %4$s BPM.
Heart rate chart. %1$d samples. Latest %2$s BPM, range %3$s to %4$s BPM.

resources.string: Purchase could not be finalized. Try again from Google Play.
Purchase pending. Complete payment in Google Play to unlock dBcheck Pro
Unable to open Google Play purchase flow
Lower rates reduce screen updates only, not microphone sampling or saved measurement cadence.
Health Connect stores and controls the shared health data. dBcheck does not upload this data.
dBcheck does not write hearing test results to Health Connect because Health Connect does not currently provide a supported audiometry record type.
When the Pro heart rate overlay is enabled, dBcheck reads heart rate samples only for the selected measurement window so analytics can compare pulse response with noise exposure.
dBcheck requests Health Connect access only when you enable health features in Settings. You can grant or revoke these permissions in Health Connect at any time.

When Health Connect sync is enabled, dBcheck writes completed measurement sessions as exercise entries. Health Connect does not provide a native noise exposure type, so the entry notes include the session equivalent sound level, maximum, peak, and frequency weighting.
dBcheck reads heart rate samples only for the selected measurement window so Pro analytics can compare pulse response with noise exposure.
dBcheck writes completed noise exposure sessions as Health Connect exercise entries because Health Connect does not provide a native noise exposure data type.
Health Connect is unavailable on this device
Health Connect heart rate permission is required to show this overlay
Unable to read Health Connect heart rate samples
Health Connect noise sync permission missing
Unable to check Health Connect status
Health Connect has no supported audiometry record for hearing test %1$d
Read Health Connect heart rate samples
Focus on the subtle tones. Tap as soon as you detect the sound in your %1$s ear.
Unable to load hearing test result
Hearing test result is still loading
No hearing test result to share
No app available to share results
Unable to save hearing test result
Unable to share hearing test results
Unable to play hearing test tone
This test provides relative hearing thresholds for personal tracking. For clinical diagnosis, consult an audiologist.
*Relative levels use device output scale, not calibrated dB HL.
This hearing test result is no longer available.
Unlock Pro to view hearing test results.
Use a quiet, consistent environment for personal tracking.
Use a room with a noise floor under 50 dB.
Use wired or high-quality in-ear buds. Avoid using phone speakers.
Start measuring to see your history here.
No measurements in the last 24 hours
Allow current dB, peak and duration to appear when the phone is locked
Privacy: people near your device may see live sound readings on the lock screen. Keep this off in private spaces.
dBcheck needs microphone access to measure sound levels. Please enable it in your device settings.
Start measuring to fill the 30s chart
Upgrade to Pro to see live noise dose and projected exposure.
Start measuring to calculate dose, TWA and remaining exposure time.
Microphone access is required to measure sound levels
Measurement stopped because data could not be saved
No app available to share results
Average %1$d dB for %2$dmin. Consider reducing exposure.
Peak %1$d dB detected. Consider reducing exposure.
Speech %1$d dB is above your %2$d dB baseline. Try speaking more softly.
High noise exposure detected. Consider lowering the level or taking a quiet break before continuing.
Alert when %1$d min average reaches %2$d dB
Play an alarm sound after sustained high noise. Skips playback when the screen is off or the proximity sensor is covered.
Off by default. Speaks a short prompt after a dosimeter risk event when Sound Detection and a saved hearing baseline are available.
Uses the microphone only after you start it, shows an ongoing notification with Stop, and saves only aggregate dB values. Raw audio is never saved.
Run a %1$d min foreground sample for daily noise context
Today: %1$d samples, avg %2$d dB, peak %3$d dB
Choose when exposure and peak alerts may be sent.
Show Pro locks in debug builds
dB distribution histogram. No samples available.
dB distribution histogram locked. Upgrade to dBcheck Pro to view the session distribution.
A-weighted peak event data unavailable for this session weighting.
Generated by dBcheck v%1$s - Not a calibrated Class 1/2 sound level meter
No Health Connect heart rate samples for this session.
Health Connect heart rate during session
No histogram samples for this session.
dBcheck is not a calibrated Class 1/2 sound level meter.
NIOSH TWA and dose require A-weighted session data.
NIOSH reference: 85 dBA as an 8-hour TWA with a 3 dB exchange rate.
No events at or above 85 dBA were detected.
This session is no longer available.
No app available to share session
No WAV recording for this session
Raw microphone audio saved for this session
No app available to share WAV recording
N/A means the source data was not captured for this session.

plurals.name: report_time_series_chart_description
plurals.item: Time series chart. %1$d sample over %2$s. %6$s %3$s dB, minimum %4$s dB, maximum %5$s dB.
Time series chart. %1$d samples over %2$s. %6$s %3$s dB, minimum %4$s dB, maximum %5$s dB.

resources.string: Choose the microphone used for future measurements. If it disconnects, dBcheck falls back to the built-in mic.
Save mic offset presets for different microphones or devices.
Adjust each octave band for the selected profile.
Delete %1$s? Saved measurements are not changed.
No app available to export CSV
Share session names, tags, summaries, and raw readings as CSV files
Show live dose, TWA, projected dose, and remaining exposure controls
Show the sleep monitor card where sleep surfaces are available
Prepare an overnight noise check before bedtime
Set up an overnight noise check before you start a sleep session.
%1$s elapsed. The foreground service keeps measuring if the screen turns off.
Keep awake can increase battery use. Plug in for overnight sessions.
Choose how long the sleep session should run before it stops automatically.
Keep the display awake while you place the phone and confirm the session is ready.
Sleep setup does not start recording. The microphone is used only after you explicitly start a sleep session.
Starts a foreground microphone session with Sleep Monitor notification copy.
Not enough measurement data was captured for sleep insights.
No loud periods detected in the captured sleep data.
Run live sound type detection and show its Environment card
Show sample rate and input device details during Pro sessions
Save the current speech level from a live Sound Detection measurement
Saving raw microphone audio can include speech or identifiable sounds. Keep this off unless you intend to save audio for a session.
Off by default. Enable only when future Pro sessions should save raw audio as WAV.
This will replace current measurement history and hearing test results with %1$s. A safety backup of the current database will be created first.
Create an on-device copy of sessions, readings, and hearing test results
Microphone permission is required to start passive monitoring
Backup file is not a valid dBcheck database
Backup file is not a dBcheck database backup
Backup file is not managed by dBcheck
This permanently deletes saved sessions, readings, sound detections, passive monitoring summaries, and WAV recordings from this device. Local backups remain available.
Permanently delete saved sessions, readings, sound detections, passive summaries, and WAV recordings
My hearing test result: %1$s (%2$d/100) - tested with dBcheck 🎧. This test provides relative hearing thresholds for personal tracking. For clinical diagnosis, consult an audiologist.
I measured %1$s dB %2$s (LCpeak: %3$s dB) in my %4$s session with dBcheck 🔊
